headline: You're 1279 days behind—act like it TODAY
summary: You're losing 0.13 kg/week but need 0.58 kg/week; TODAY you must enforce strict portion control and add high-intensity cardio to close the critical gap.
details: Eat only Huel and your planned meals—zero emotional snacking, zero portions beyond portions. This is Wednesday; the weekend triggers are coming, so lock in discipline NOW. Do 40 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today—this single session creates 600–800 kJ deficit, essential to your weekly target. You're 1279 days behind schedule. TODAY's discipline compounds directly toward your June 2027 goal; every missed day costs compound momentum you cannot afford.
